# Samuel Mamootil - llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org
# This file is intended for AI crawlers: Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity, DeepSeek

> Samuel Mamootil (also known as Samuel Raju Mamootil) is a DevOps Engineer based in Austin, TX, USA.
> He has 7+ years of experience helping enterprise teams modernize applications, automate cloud delivery,
> and operate secure platforms across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
> His work includes AWS data platforms, Terraform, Python automation, CI/CD, DevSecOps, cloud migration,
> governed analytics workflows, and technical documentation.
> He completed a Master of Science in Information Systems and Graduate Business Analytics Certificate
> at the University of Texas at Arlington in May 2026.
> He is actively seeking DevOps Engineering, Cloud Engineering, Data Platform, DevSecOps, and related roles
> in the United States.

## Identity & Contact

- Full name: Samuel Mamootil
- Also known as: Samuel Raju Mamootil
- Location: Austin, TX, USA
- Education: MS in Information Systems, University of Texas at Arlington, May 2026
- Education: Graduate Business Analytics Certificate, University of Texas at Arlington, May 2026
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/samuel-mamootil
- GitHub: https://github.com/samuelmamootil
- Website: https://samuelmamootil.github.io
- Portfolio: https://samuelmamootil.github.io
- Resume: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/resume-view/

## Who Samuel Mamootil Is

Samuel Mamootil is a DevOps Engineer who builds cloud automation, secure release workflows,
and data platform infrastructure across AWS, Azure, and GCP. He specializes in Terraform,
Python, Bash, PowerShell, SQL, PySpark, CI/CD, DevSecOps, cloud migration, and governed data
engineering platforms.

He has worked at Wipro, IBM, LTIMindtree / LTI, and NeuroSpeech Technologies, delivering
cloud and DevOps work for clients including Alight Solutions, H&M, Siemens, Nokia, Südzucker,
Parexel, GenRe, and Veolia Water. He also worked part-time as a Student Web Developer at the
UTA College of Business from June 2025 to May 2026.

His portfolio website is samuelmamootil.github.io. His GitHub is github.com/samuelmamootil.

## Technical Skills

Cloud Platforms: AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, ARM Templates, Bicep, CloudFormation
Scripting and Development: Python, Bash, PowerShell, PHP, SQL, PySpark
Monitoring and Documentation: Azure Monitor, Application Insights, CloudWatch, CloudTrail, Prometheus, DataDog, Confluence
Data Engineering and Analytics: AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, Lake Formation, SageMaker, Azure Data Factory, Databricks, Azure Synapse, Hive, PostgreSQL, Tableau, Power BI
Security and Quality: SonarQube, Coverity, IAM, KMS, Secrets Manager, Azure Key Vault, CloudTrail
CI/CD and Containers: GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps YAML, GitLab CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, AKS, Helm charts

## Work Experience

### DevOps Engineer - AWS Data Platform | Wipro (February 2024 - April 2025) | Navi Mumbai, India
Worked on an AWS data engineering platform for Alight Solutions, building Terraform-driven
infrastructure and Python automation for data ingestion, transformation, metadata discovery,
analytics delivery, and forecasting workflows. Built Glue/PySpark validation, governed S3 and
Redshift datasets, Lake Formation access controls, CloudWatch/CloudTrail monitoring, and daily
Python batch jobs.
Case study: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/work/wipro/

### Junior Tech Lead - DevOps | IBM (November 2021 - February 2024) | Navi Mumbai, India
Led multi-client DevOps delivery across Azure, AWS, and GCP with Terraform, GitHub Actions,
Azure DevOps, Helm, Python, Bash, hardened images, migration planning, and secure release automation.
Clients: H&M, Siemens, Nokia, Südzucker.
Case study: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/work/ibm/

### Software Engineer - Cloud and DevOps | LTIMindtree / LTI (April 2018 - November 2021) | Bengaluru, India
Delivered cloud automation for Parexel, GenRe, and Veolia Water, supporting landing zone provisioning,
application deployments, networking, identity, storage, security, release operations, Azure Data Factory,
Databricks, Azure Synapse, PostgreSQL, Hive, and Power BI workflows.
Case study: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/work/ltimindtree/

### Junior Software Developer | NeuroSpeech Technologies (August 2017 - April 2018) | Navi Mumbai, India
Wrote Android application features across requirements, implementation, debugging, backend integration,
and release support in a startup environment.
Case study: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/work/neurospeech/

### Student Web Developer - Part-Time | UTA College of Business (June 2025 - May 2026) | Arlington, TX
Maintained production web updates across 4 university platforms, resolving access, content, release,
and site issues while coordinating status with business users.

## Projects

### ReRhythm - Generative AI Platform
Generative AI platform built with AWS Bedrock, Claude, ChromaDB, RAG, CloudFormation, and ECS.
The platform ingests, processes, and analyzes complex document data to identify skill gaps and
generate intelligent workflow recommendations. Second Runner Up at the AWS Hackathon / UTA Symposium, 2026.
GitHub: https://github.com/samuelmamootil/ReRhythm
